title: Military Balance+
gist: Product marketing page for IISS Military Balance+, an online defence database covering 170+ countries with equipment, budget, procurement, personnel and deployment data. Mostly promotional, but it discloses one concrete coverage figure useful for sizing the defence-data landscape.

insights.claim: IISS Military Balance+ provides defence-budget data and multi-year forecasts for 30 countries that account for 88% of global defence expenditure.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: A concrete concentration metric — global defence spend is highly concentrated, so tracking ~30 countries captures the addressable market for defence-industrial suppliers.
insights.quote: view defence budget forecasts for 30 countries, accounting for 88% of global defence expenditure

insights.claim: Military Balance+ surfaces procurement data identifying prime and subcontractors per programme and emerging opportunities by country across 170+ states.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: A vendor-mapping tool for spotting which defence primes and suppliers are winning programmes by country — useful for tracking defence-contractor backlogs.
insights.quote: identify the prime and subcontractors involved in each programme and the equipment type being ordered
